==Biography==
Daniel started out playing Counter Strike, Gunbound, Ragnarok Online, and World of Warcraft. He has been playing League of Legends since 2011.

== Trivia ==
* Known for his {{ci|Nautilus}}, {{ci|Elise}} and {{ci|Vi}}.
* Known for being overly patient with his ganks which sometimes results in him sitting in the brush for minutes at a time.
* Met [[Takeshi]] in Ragnarok back in 2010 and since then they have been playing in the same team, despite just meeting IRL for the first time in October/2012.
* Popularized {{ci|Nautilus}} and {{ci|Sejuani}} in Brazilian Servers (Season 3).
* Portrayed as {{ci|Rammus}} in the CBLoL 2015 official wallpaper.
* Known for having participated in what is considered one of the CBLOL's worst campaigns, [[T Show]] 0-18, which lost every game of the split.<ref>[https://www.techtudo.com.br/noticias/2019/02/tshow-em-2017-relembre-a-pior-campanha-da-historia-do-cblol-esports.ghtml TSHOW em 2017: relembre a pior campanha da história do CBLoL (Portuguese)] ''techtudo.com.br''</ref>
